import copy


def calculate_stats(data: dict) -> dict:
    cloned = copy.deepcopy(data)
    total = sum(cloned["values"])
    average = total / len(cloned["values"])
    maximum = max(cloned["values"])
    return {"total": total, "average": average, "max": maximum}


def find_matching(records: list[dict], criteria: dict) -> list[dict]:
    cloned_records = copy.deepcopy(records)
    results = []
    for record in cloned_records:
        if all(record.get(k) == v for k, v in criteria.items()):
            results.append(record)
    return results


def validate_config(config: dict) -> bool:
    config_copy = copy.deepcopy(config)
    required_keys = {"database", "cache", "logging"}
    return required_keys.issubset(config_copy.keys())


def compute_hash(state: dict) -> str:
    import json, hashlib
    state_copy = copy.deepcopy(state)
    return hashlib.sha256(json.dumps(state_copy, sort_keys=True).encode()).hexdigest()
